name: WorkspaceModel
summary: Represents base class for all kind of workspaces which contains general data such as Name, collections of nodes, notes, annotations, etc.

constructors.signature: void WorkspaceModel(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel> nodes, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Notes.NoteModel> notes, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Annotations.AnnotationModel> annotations, Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceInfo info, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory factory, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Presets.PresetModel> presets, ProtoCore.Namespace.ElementResolver resolver)

void WorkspaceModel(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel> nodes, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Notes.NoteModel> notes, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Annotations.AnnotationModel> annotations, Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceInfo info, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory factory, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Presets.PresetModel> presets, ProtoCore.Namespace.ElementResolver resolver, Dynamo.Linting.LinterManager linterManager)

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clears this workspace of nodes, notes, and connectors.

methods.name: CreateModel(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.summary: Creates Dynamo.Graph.ModelBase object by given xml data and adds it to corresponding collection of the workspace.

methods.name: DeleteModel(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.summary: Deletes Dynamo.Graph.ModelBase object given by System.Xml.XmlElement from a corresponding collection of the workspace.

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

methods.name: FromJson(string, Dynamo.Engine.LibraryServices, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController, Dynamo.Scheduler.DynamoScheduler, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory, bool, bool, Dynamo.Core.CustomNodeManager)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceModel FromJson(string json, Dynamo.Engine.LibraryServices libraryServices, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController engineController, Dynamo.Scheduler.DynamoScheduler scheduler, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory factory, bool isTestMode, bool verboseLogging, Dynamo.Core.CustomNodeManager manager)
methods.summary: Load a WorkspaceModel from json. If the WorkspaceModel is a HomeWorkspaceModel it will be set as the current workspace.

methods.name: FromJson(string, Dynamo.Engine.LibraryServices, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController, Dynamo.Scheduler.DynamoScheduler, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory, bool, bool, Dynamo.Core.CustomNodeManager, Dynamo.Linting.LinterManager)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceModel FromJson(string json, Dynamo.Engine.LibraryServices libraryServices, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController engineController, Dynamo.Scheduler.DynamoScheduler scheduler, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory factory, bool isTestMode, bool verboseLogging, Dynamo.Core.CustomNodeManager manager, Dynamo.Linting.LinterManager linterManager)
methods.summary: Load a WorkspaceModel from json. If the WorkspaceModel is a HomeWorkspaceModel it will be set as the current workspace.

methods.name: GetModelForElement(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.summary: Gets model by GUID which is contained in given Xml data.

methods.name: GetSharedName
methods.summary: Returns appropriate name of workspace for sharing.

methods.name: NodeModified(Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel)
methods.summary: Indicates that the AST for a node in this workspace requires recompilation

methods.name: OnDummyNodesReloaded
methods.summary: This method invokes the DummyNodesReloaded event on the workspace model.

methods.name: RecordModelsForModification(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.ModelBase>)
methods.summary: Implement recording node modification for undo/redo.

params.name: models
params.doc: Collection of Dynamo.Graph.ModelBase objects to record.

methods.name: ReloadModel(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.summary: Updates Dynamo.Graph.ModelBase object with given xml data

methods.name: RemoveGroup(Dynamo.Graph.ModelBase)
methods.summary: Deletes Dynamo.Graph.Annotations.AnnotationModel object from annotation collection of the workspace.

methods.name: ReportPosition
methods.summary: Called when workspace position is changed. This method notifyies all the listeners when a workspace is changed.

methods.name: ResetWorkspaceCore
methods.summary: Derived workspace classes can choose to override this method to perform clean-up specific to them.

methods.name: Save(string, bool, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController)
methods.signature: void Save(string filePath, bool isBackup, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController engine)
methods.summary: Workspace's Save method serializes the Workspace to JSON and writes it to the specified file path.

params.name: isBackup
params.doc: A flag indicating whether this save operation represents a backup. If it's not backup, we should add it to recent files. Otherwise leave it.

params.name: engine
params.doc: An EngineController instance to be used to serialize node bindings.

throws.when: Thrown when the file path is null.

methods.name: UpdateUndoRedoStack
methods.summary: Notifies the UI that the undo/redo state has changed so that undo/redo buttons can be enabled/disabled.

methods.name: UpdateWithExtraWorkspaceViewInfo(Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.ExtraWorkspaceViewInfo)
methods.summary: Updates a workspace model with extra view information. When loading a workspace from JSON, the data is split into two parts, model and view. This method sets the view information.

params.name: workspaceViewInfo
params.doc: The extra view information from the workspace to update the model with.

methods.name: UpdateWithExtraWorkspaceViewInfo(Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.ExtraWorkspaceViewInfo, double, double)
methods.signature: void UpdateWithExtraWorkspaceViewInfo(Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.ExtraWorkspaceViewInfo workspaceViewInfo, double offsetX, double offsetY)
methods.summary: Updates a workspace model with extra view information. When loading a workspace from JSON, the data is split into two parts, model and view. This method sets the view information. This overload allows to 'move' the incoming when placing them

params.name: offsetX
params.doc: Offset in X direction (positive - left, negative - right)

params.name: offsetY
params.doc: Offset in Y direction (positive - down, negative - up)

properties.name: Annotations
properties.summary: Returns all of the annotations currently present in the workspace.

properties.name: Author
properties.summary: An author of the workspace

properties.name: CanRedo
properties.summary: Determine if redo operation is currently possible.

properties.name: CanUndo
properties.summary: Determine if undo operation is currently possible.

properties.name: CenterX
properties.summary: Implements Dynamo.Graph.ILocatable.CenterX property.

properties.name: CenterY
properties.summary: Implements Dynamo.Graph.ILocatable.CenterY property.

properties.name: Connectors
properties.summary: All of the connectors currently in the workspace.

properties.name: CurrentSelection
properties.summary: WorkspaceModel.CurrentSelection

properties.name: Dependencies
properties.summary: gathers the direct customNode workspace dependencies of this workspace.

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: A description of the workspace

properties.name: ElementResolver
properties.summary: Returns Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceModel.ElementResolver. This property resolves partial class name to fully resolved name.

properties.name: FileName
properties.summary: Path to the file this workspace is associated with. If null or empty, this workspace has never been saved.

properties.name: Guid
properties.summary: A unique identifier for the workspace.

properties.name: HasUnsavedChanges
properties.summary: Are there unsaved changes in the workspace?

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: Returns the height of the workspace's bounds.

properties.name: IsReadOnly
properties.summary: Returns if current workspace is readonly.

properties.name: LastSaved
properties.summary: The date of the last save.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of this workspace.

properties.name: Nodes
properties.summary: All of the nodes currently in the workspace.

properties.name: Notes
properties.summary: Returns the notes Dynamo.Graph.Notes.NoteModel collection.

properties.name: Presets
properties.summary: A set of input parameter states, this can be used to set the graph to a serialized state.

properties.name: Rect
properties.summary: Returns the bounds of the workspace.

properties.name: ScaleFactor
properties.summary: The geometry scale factor specific to the workspace obtained from user input when selecting the scale of the model with which he/she is working. This is used by ProtoGeometry to scale geometric values appropriately before passing them to ASM. This property is set either when reading the setting from a DYN file or when the setting is updated from the UI.

properties.name: ShowPythonAutoMigrationNotifications
properties.summary: Flag indicating whether the “Python Engine Change” notice should be shown on save/close. Runtime-only (not serialized) and reset on workspace switch.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: Returns the width of the workspace's bounds.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Returns or set the X position of the workspace.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Returns or set the Y position of the workspace

properties.name: Zoom
properties.summary: Get or set the zoom value of the workspace.

events.name: AnnotationAdded
events.summary: Event that is fired when an annotation is added to the workspace.

events.name: AnnotationRemoved
events.summary: Event that is fired when an annotation is removed from the workspace.

events.name: AnnotationsCleared
events.summary: Event that is fired when annotations are cleared from the workspace.

events.name: ConnectorAdded
events.summary: Event that is fired when a connector is added to the workspace.

events.name: ConnectorDeleted
events.summary: Event that is fired when a connector is deleted from a workspace.

events.name: CurrentOffsetChanged
events.summary: Event that is fired every time the position offset of a workspace changes.

events.name: Disposed
events.summary: Event that is fired when this workspace is disposed of.

events.name: DummyNodesReloaded
events.summary: This event is raised after the workspace tries to resolve existing dummyNodes - for example after a new package or library is loaded.

events.name: MessageLogged
events.summary: Triggers when something needs to be logged

events.name: NodeAdded
events.summary: Event that is fired when a node is added to the workspace.

events.name: NodeRemoved
events.summary: Event that is fired when a node is removed from the workspace.

events.name: NodesCleared
events.summary: Event that is fired when nodes are cleared from the workspace.

events.name: NoteAdded
events.summary: Event that is fired when a note is added to the workspace.

events.name: NoteRemoved
events.summary: Event that is fired when a note is removed from the workspace.

events.name: NotesCleared
events.summary: Event that is fired when notes are cleared from the workspace.

events.name: RequestNodeCentered
events.summary: Event that is fired when a workspace requests that a Node or Note model is centered.

events.name: Saved
events.summary: Event that is fired when the workspace is saved.

events.name: Saving
events.summary: Event that is fired during the saving of the workspace. Add additional XmlNode objects to the XmlDocument provided, in order to save data to the file.

events.name: WorkspaceSaving
events.summary: Event that is fired when the workspace is starting the save process.
